title: pinus laricio var. poiretiana
intro: Pinus laricio var. poiretiana, also known as Calabrian pine, is a variant of the Pinus laricio tree species, native to the Mediterranean region. It is a coniferous evergreen tree that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The Calabrian pine has been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Calabrian pine include essential oils, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to make teas, topical creams, and other products for medicinal and therapeutic purposes.
